components.text: Accelerates Qi absorption significantly — days of careful meditation compressed into hours. The first time I used one I had to stop halfway through to let my meridians settle.
This is the pill I reach for most during intensive cultivation. It does not do the work for you. It makes the work faster. The distinction matters.

Strengthens the body to better contain and process higher volumes of Qi. As cultivation deepens, the body must be strong enough to hold what the spirit accumulates — otherwise the excess damages from inside.
I learned this after an aggressive session left me bedridden for three days with what felt like bruising from inside my chest. Use this alongside the Essence Gathering Pill.
Sharpens the spirit's ability to direct and control cultivated Qi. Qi without direction is pressure without purpose — it accumulates and causes problems.
Without soul focus, the other two pills produce Qi that goes nowhere useful. All three work together. Neglect one and the others become less effective or actively harmful.
